'''Sideshow Collectibles''' is a [[Wikipedia:California|California]]-based toy company that makes licensed action figures and movie collectibles. In [[2004]] they made an agreement with [[Lucasfilm]] to produce ''Star Wars'' merchandise,<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.sideshowtoy.com/?page_id=1239|text=Sideshow Collectibles and Lucasfilm Entertainment Enter 3-Year Agreement to Produce "Star Wars" Collectibles|date=2004-07-09|archivedate=20130703073428}}</ref> which over the years has taken the form of 12-inch figures, premium-format figures, life-size collectibles, and dioramas.

Often the figures come in a regular and exclusive version, the exclusive version containing different or new accessories from the regular, and only available for purchase online through Sideshow or at various conventions.
